function.name: _table_update_tool_bar_button
function.description: Update a toolbar button configuration at the top of the data table. Must call _table_list_tool_bar_button first to get button ID.

action.description: Button trigger behavior type. Options: CallScript, CallAutomatic

actionSetting.description: Button behavior configuration. When action is CallScript, func, scriptId and args are needed; when action is CallAutomatic, automaticId is needed, varList is optional.

scriptId.description: Script ID to call (required for CallScript)

args.description: Parameter list passed to the script (used for CallScript)

valueVar.description: Parameter variable expression. Supported variables: current user: ${user} (user object has id, name, roleList, departmentList properties, use ${user.id} for current user id); user selected record list: ${tableSelectedRecordList}; current module identifier: ${moduleKey}

automaticId.description: Automation ID to call (required for CallAutomatic)

varList.description: Variable list passed to the automation (optional for CallAutomatic)

value.description: Variable value. Supported variables: current user: ${user} (user object has id, name, roleList, departmentList properties, use ${user.id} for current user id); user selected record list: ${tableSelectedRecordList}; current module identifier: ${moduleKey}

type.description: Button style type. Options: default, primary, success, warning, danger

hideExpression.description: Hide button when expression condition is met. Button is hidden when expression evaluates to true. Note: visibleRoleList is deprecated. Use hideExpression and disableExpression for button permission control.

disableExpression.description: Disable button when expression condition is met. Button is disabled when expression evaluates to true.
